problem.title: The Challenges Families Face
problem.subtitle: Families in Türkiye want the best international opportunities for their children. But the path often looks complicated.

items.title: Studying abroad is expensive and risky
items.desc: Family relocation, visa processes, and living costs abroad — this path isn't practical for most families.

items.title: Leaving the current school is a big decision
items.desc: You don't want to uproot your child from their school and social life in Türkiye. You're right not to.

items.title: International opportunities are being missed
items.desc: Applying to global universities requires an internationally recognized diploma. But how do you get one?

items.title: Hard to know where to start
items.desc: You need someone who understands the system and can guide you through the right steps.

solution.title: The Dual Diploma — The Best of Both Worlds
solution.subtitle: Continue school in Türkiye. Earn a Canadian diploma online in parallel.

items.title: Current school stays the same
items.desc: Your child continues their Turkish school full-time. Nothing is sacrificed.

items.title: Fully online parallel program
items.desc: The Canadian Ontario curriculum is completed fully online through TVO ILC's platform.

items.title: Official Canadian diploma (OSSD)
items.desc: The Ontario Secondary School Diploma issued through TVO ILC — globally recognized.

items.title: Step-by-step guidance from Türkiye
items.desc: Our local expert team manages every step of the process, from enrollment to graduation.

valueProp.title: Two Diplomas, One Educational Journey
valueProp.subtitle: Your student can continue their school in Türkiye while pursuing a Canadian high school diploma online, through a structured and planned pathway. The process is guided by academic clarity and local support.

international.title: School Stays the Same
international.description: Your student keeps their current school routine while pursuing the Canadian diploma pathway in parallel. No disruption to their social life or academic schedule.

remote.title: Fully Online Structure
remote.description: The program runs entirely through a digital learning environment. Students access their courses from wherever they are, following a flexible and structured plan.

credible.title: A Planned Academic Pathway
credible.description: The diploma journey is structured around the student's existing academic background. The process becomes clear, organized, and predictable from the start.

mentorship.title: Local Guidance and Support
mentorship.description: Catalyst provides local guidance from enrollment through to completion. Families navigate the process with confidence, clarity, and consistent support.

process.title: How It Works
process.subtitle: A structured and transparent process. From your first consultation to graduation, every step is clear and we are with you at every stage.
process.subtitleNote: The entire process can be completed without leaving Turkey.

steps.title: Pre-Consultation & Initial Application
steps.desc1: In the initial meeting with our expert team, the student's grade level, current academic status, and goals are assessed.
steps.desc2: Required documents are collected and the pre-registration process is initiated.

steps.title: Transcript & Curriculum Review
steps.desc1: The student's existing transcripts and their school's curriculum are reviewed in detail.
steps.desc2: This determines which courses will be credited and which must be completed to graduate.

steps.title: Equivalency & Academic Planning
steps.desc1: Based on the assessment, a personalized credit plan is created for the student's Canadian High School Diploma.
steps.desc2: This plan is fully tailored to the student's individual academic history.

steps.title: Enrollment & Program Start
steps.desc1: The enrollment agreement is finalized with the family and the student is officially registered in the program.
steps.desc2: The course schedule is confirmed and the academic journey begins.

steps.title: Online Learning & Continuous Monitoring
steps.desc1: All courses are delivered through Brightspace, the official platform used by the Ontario Ministry of Education.
steps.desc2: The student's academic progress is regularly monitored and reported to the family.

steps.title: Graduation
steps.desc1: Students who successfully complete the required courses earn the Ontario Secondary School Diploma.

steps.title: University Applications & Mentorship
steps.desc1: After graduation, guidance and mentorship support is provided for the student's university application process.
steps.desc2: Our goal is to ensure the student confidently transitions to their next educational step.

faq.title: Diploma Program — Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Honest answers to the most common questions about the dual diploma program.
faq.contactPrompt: Our team is ready to walk you through the process and evaluate your child's specific situation.

items.question: Can my child continue their school in Türkiye?
items.answer: Yes. This is the core advantage of the dual diploma program. Your child continues their Turkish school full-time while completing the Canadian curriculum online in parallel. No school change or relocation is required.

items.question: Is this diploma actually valid and recognized?
items.answer: Yes. The Ontario Secondary School Diploma (OSSD) is an official Canadian high school diploma recognized by universities in Canada, the US, UK, Europe, and worldwide. It is issued through TVO ILC, the Ontario Ministry of Education's designated distance learning partner.

items.question: Is the program completely online?
items.answer: Yes. All courses are completed online through TVO ILC's official Brightspace platform. No relocation from Türkiye is required.

items.question: What is Catalyst Education's role?
items.answer: Catalyst is the authorized TVO ILC representative in Türkiye. We handle enrollment, equivalency planning, document management, and local mentorship. We do not issue the diploma — TVO ILC does. We ensure the process is done correctly from start to finish.

items.question: How do I get started?
items.answer: Simply fill out the form. Our advisors will call you, evaluate your child's situation, and plan the next steps together. No commitment required.

finalCta.title: Take the Right Step Today
finalCta.subtitle: Get free information. Our advisors will explain the program step by step and assess your child's situation.
finalCta.whatsappSub: We typically respond within a few minutes

whatsapp.message: Hello, I would like to get information about the dual diploma program.

trustSection.title: Backed by Canada's Most Trusted Distance Learning Authority
trustSection.subtitle: Catalyst Education is an officially authorized administrative partner for TVO ILC — Ontario's Ministry of Education designated distance learning program. Students receive genuine Ontario curriculum delivery and graduate with an internationally recognized diploma.
trustSection.item1Desc: Officially authorized to administer TVO ILC courses to international students through Ontario's sub-licensing model.
trustSection.item2Desc: TVO ILC is designated by Ontario's Ministry of Education as its official distance learning program for secondary students.
trustSection.item3Desc: The Ontario Secondary School Diploma is accepted by universities in Canada, the US, UK, Australia, Europe, and beyond.
trustSection.item4Desc: From prior learning assessment to personalized course planning and graduation monitoring — every step is guided by Catalyst's expert team.
trustSection.diplomaNote: The OSSD is granted by TVO ILC upon successful completion of all requirements. Catalyst Education manages the administrative and support process as an authorized representative.

diplomaPage.heroHighlight: Global Recognition. Online Flexibility. Structured Support.
diplomaPage.heroSubtitle: Catalyst Education is an authorized administrative representative for TVO ILC — Ontario's official Ministry of Education distance learning program. International students can pursue a genuine OSSD while continuing their existing schooling.
diplomaPage.whatDesc1: The Ontario Secondary School Diploma (OSSD) is the official high school leaving certificate issued by the Province of Ontario, Canada — recognized by universities worldwide. It is accepted by universities and colleges across Canada, the USA, the UK, Australia, and 100+ countries.
diplomaPage.whatDesc2: Through TVO ILC — Ontario Ministry of Education's designated distance learning partner — international students can complete the required courses fully online, earning a diploma that opens doors to global universities.
diplomaPage.whatDesc3: Catalyst Education administers this pathway as an authorized representative, managing enrollment, course planning, prior learning assessment, and student support from start to graduation.
diplomaPage.whatDesc4: Students can pursue a Canadian diploma while continuing at their current school — no relocation required.
diplomaPage.forWhoItem1Desc: Students who want to earn an internationally recognized Canadian diploma alongside their current school — without leaving Türkiye.
diplomaPage.forWhoItem2Desc: Families who want to prepare their child for universities in Canada, the US, the UK, or Europe — with trusted guidance throughout the process.
diplomaPage.forWhoItem3Desc: Students who want a fully online, self-paced academic pathway that fits alongside their existing school schedule.
diplomaPage.step1Desc: Meet with our advisors to understand the program, assess your child's situation, and map out the path to the OSSD.
diplomaPage.step2Desc: Your student's existing academic transcripts are reviewed. Prior learning is assessed to determine equivalent credits and identify the required courses.
diplomaPage.step3Desc: A tailored course plan is built around the assessment results. Students take only the courses they need — nothing more.
diplomaPage.step4Desc: Courses are completed through TVO ILC's official Brightspace platform. Content is evaluated by Canadian teachers. Learning is fully flexible.
diplomaPage.step5Desc: The diploma pathway includes Ontario literacy requirements and community involvement hours, both of which are managed and guided by Catalyst Education.
diplomaPage.step6Desc: After completing all requirements, the OSSD is awarded by TVO ILC. Catalyst provides mentorship support for global university applications.
diplomaPage.diplomaValue1Desc: Universities in 100+ countries recognize the Ontario Secondary School Diploma as a valid high school credential for admission.
diplomaPage.diplomaValue2Desc: No relocation required. Students complete all coursework digitally through TVO ILC's platform from wherever they are.
diplomaPage.diplomaValue3Desc: Students maintain their current school routine. The OSSD program runs in parallel — no disruption to their academic or social life.
diplomaPage.diplomaValue4Desc: TVO ILC is not a private certificate provider. It is the Ontario Ministry of Education's designated distance learning program.
diplomaPage.supportDesc: Catalyst is not just an enrollment agent. We are an authorized administrative partner that manages every element of the student journey.
diplomaPage.support2: Prior learning and transcript equivalency review
diplomaPage.disclaimerDesc: Catalyst Education does not issue the OSSD. The diploma is awarded by TVO ILC upon successful fulfillment of all Ontario Ministry of Education requirements. Catalyst manages the administrative and support process as an authorized representative.
diplomaPage.advantageTitle: A Canadian Diploma From Turkey — Made Possible
diplomaPage.advantageDesc: Some requirements of the Ontario Secondary School Diploma would normally require physical presence in Canada. Through Catalyst Education's Turkey representation, students can fulfill these requirements without leaving Turkey — continuing their current school routine while working toward a Canadian diploma.
diplomaPage.advantageBullet1: Complete the full diploma process from Turkey
diplomaPage.glanceDefinition: OSSD (Ontario Secondary School Diploma) is Canada's official high school diploma, issued by the Ontario Ministry of Education.
diplomaPage.glanceValue1: Ontario Ministry of Education (via TVO ILC)
diplomaPage.glanceSub3: Via Brightspace, Canada's official learning management platform
diplomaPage.glanceValue5: Students can complete the Canadian diploma process without leaving Turkey.
diplomaPage.glanceValue6: Authorized administrative representative and student support partner
diplomaPage.ctaSubtitle: Book a free consultation. Our advisors will assess your child's academic background and outline a clear path forward.

certificatesPage.heroSubtitle: Work on real projects in AI, Blockchain, and Entrepreneurship through Ontario Tech University-supported programs and earn internationally recognized certificates.
certificatesPage.heroNote: Seats are limited. New cohorts open every 4 months.
certificatesPage.aboutDesc: Brilliant Catalyst is Ontario Tech University's innovation and entrepreneurship hub, delivering market-driven programs that bridge education and industry. With a proven track record of supporting over 280 startups across 15 industries and awarding more than $500,000 in funding, Brilliant Catalyst equips changemakers with the tools and mentorship they need to thrive.
certificatesPage.why1Desc: Learn AI, Blockchain, and Advanced Manufacturing with real-world applications — preparing you for careers, startups, and further studies.
certificatesPage.why2Desc: Gain a recognized certification from Ontario Tech University that adds credibility to your resume, university applications, and job prospects.
certificatesPage.why3Desc: Choose between a Self-Paced Program for independent study or an Instructor-Led Cohort with expert sessions, a hackathon, and a pitch competition.
certificatesPage.why4Title: Learn from Experts & Build Your Network
certificatesPage.why4Desc: Gain insights from leading industry professionals, startup mentors, and business experts who will guide you through the latest trends and best practices.
certificatesPage.why5Desc: In the Live Cohort, you don't just learn theory — you apply your learning in a venture-building hackathon and gain hands-on experience pitching real-world ideas.
certificatesPage.why6Desc: Students who complete the program gain a competitive advantage in securing internships, jobs, or launching their own ventures in AI, blockchain, and advanced manufacturing.
certificatesPage.programNote: You can choose to complete one, two, or all three courses — based on your career goals, personal interests, and schedule.
certificatesPage.prog1Desc: Don't just learn AI — apply it to real business problems. Build technology with an entrepreneurial mindset.
certificatesPage.prog1Audience: University students and those looking to add tech skills to their career
certificatesPage.prog2Desc: Claim your place in the Web3 and digital economy. Learn to combine blockchain and AI into real-world solutions.
certificatesPage.prog2Learn2: Smart contracts and the Web3 ecosystem
certificatesPage.prog2Audience: Those targeting a career in Fintech, Web3, and technology
certificatesPage.prog3Desc: Understand the future of manufacturing and be on the side that drives innovation. Develop entrepreneurship with an engineering perspective.
certificatesPage.prog3Audience: Those looking to advance in engineering, manufacturing, and operations
certificatesPage.format1Desc: Study independently on your own schedule. Complete course modules at your own pace within the cohort timeframe — ideal for learners with existing commitments.
certificatesPage.format2Desc: Learn alongside peers with expert-led sessions, a venture-building hackathon, and a pitch competition. The full cohort experience with mentorship, community, and real entrepreneurial application.
certificatesPage.format2Extra: Includes venture development hackathon and pitch competition.
certificatesPage.journeyTitle: Your Cohort Journey — Step by Step
certificatesPage.journey1Desc: Cohorts begin every four months throughout the year. Early registration is encouraged, but you can join at any point during the first three months of the cohort.
certificatesPage.journey2Desc: Upon registration, choose to complete one, two, or all three courses — based on your career goals, interests, and schedule.
certificatesPage.journey3Desc: Complete course modules on your own schedule within the cohort timeframe. Interactive content, real-world case studies, and structured learning paths.
certificatesPage.journey4Title: Develop and Submit Your Venture Idea
certificatesPage.journey4Desc: After completing your course(s), apply what you've learned by creating a venture idea. Submit your Lean Canvas and a 3-minute video pitch showcasing your idea.
certificatesPage.journey5Desc: Receive a certificate of completion and the Microcredential in Entrepreneurship from Ontario Tech University for completing your course(s).
certificatesPage.journey6Desc: Held at the end of each 4-month cohort. Top pitches are recognized by a jury of industry leaders. Selected participants earn one year of community access and exclusive industry-led webinars.
certificatesPage.certDesc: Upon completion, participants receive an Ontario Tech University-backed Microcredential in Entrepreneurship — an official recognition of their business innovation, venture creation, and problem-solving skills.
certificatesPage.certItem3: Recognized on resumes, LinkedIn, and graduate school applications
certificatesPage.certItem4: Validates entrepreneurial skills for startup founders and career builders
certificatesPage.ctaSubtitle: Cohorts begin every four months. Reach out to find out when the next intake opens and which program fits your goals.

corporatePage.heroHighlight: Upskill Your Team in the Technologies Reshaping Industry.
corporatePage.heroSubtitle: Catalyst Education partners with organizations to provide access to Ontario Tech University and Brilliant Catalyst's certification programs in AI, Blockchain, and Advanced Manufacturing — structured, expert-led, and internationally recognized.
corporatePage.brilliantDesc: Brilliant Catalyst is Ontario Tech University's innovation hub, delivering market-driven programs that bridge education and industry. With 280+ startups supported across 15 industries and $500,000+ in funding awarded, the programs your team will access carry real institutional credibility.
corporatePage.whyTitle: Why Organizations Partner with Catalyst Education
corporatePage.why1Desc: Course content is built around actual AI, blockchain, and advanced manufacturing frameworks — not generic overviews. Teams learn what matters for the decade ahead.
corporatePage.why2Desc: Organizations can access the full instructor-led cohort experience: expert sessions, a venture-building hackathon, and a pitch competition — all designed for applied, outcome-driven learning.
corporatePage.why3Desc: Employees receive a recognized certification from Ontario Tech University and a Microcredential in Entrepreneurship from Brilliant Catalyst — credentials that add real value to professional profiles.
corporatePage.why4Desc: Teams can enroll in one, two, or all three tracks based on their strategic priorities. Cohorts run every four months, with the ability to join in the first three months of each cohort.
corporatePage.track1Desc: Build AI fluency across your organization. Teams explore AI fundamentals, real-world applications, generative AI platforms, and how to apply AI thinking to business strategy and innovation.
corporatePage.track1Item1: What is AI & Fundamentals of AI Technology
corporatePage.track1Item4: AI for Business Innovation and Strategy
corporatePage.track2Desc: Equip innovation and technology teams with working knowledge of decentralized systems, cryptographic security, smart contracts, and how blockchain and AI are converging in financial and enterprise contexts.
corporatePage.track3Desc: Prepare operations, engineering, and production teams with practical knowledge of modern manufacturing processes, materials science, and the entrepreneurial mindset needed to drive innovation on the factory floor.
corporatePage.track3Item1: Introduction to Manufacturing and its Evolution
corporatePage.track3Item2: Mechanical and Physical Properties of Materials
corporatePage.track3Item3: Fundamentals of Metal Forming & Cutting Processes
corporatePage.format1Desc: Teams progress together through structured cohorts, building shared organizational understanding. Cohorts begin every four months — teams can join at any point during the first three months.
corporatePage.format2Desc: All content is delivered digitally. No travel, no relocation, no disruption to operations. Teams learn on a flexible schedule within the cohort timeline.
corporatePage.format3Title: One, Two, or All Three Tracks
corporatePage.format3Desc: Organizations can enroll teams in one, two, or all three certification tracks based on strategic focus areas and workforce development priorities.
corporatePage.format4Desc: Each participant earns an Ontario Tech University certificate of completion and a Microcredential in Entrepreneurship from Brilliant Catalyst — official credentials that strengthen professional profiles.
corporatePage.ctaSubtitle: Contact us to discuss your organization's upskilling needs, team size, track selection, and the next cohort start date.
corporatePage.trustNote: Corporate learning programs are an extension of Catalyst Education's broader mission to make recognized Canadian education accessible globally. All programs are backed by Ontario Tech University and Brilliant Catalyst.

footer.description: At Catalyst Education, we help students access globally recognized Canadian education opportunities. From the Ontario High School Diploma to Future Competencies Programs, we empower students on their academic and career journeys.
footer.disclaimer: Catalyst Education & Research Inc. is an authorized administrative representative of TVO ILC. Catalyst Education is not a school and does not issue diplomas directly. The OSSD is granted by TVO ILC upon completion of Ontario Ministry of Education requirements.

about.heroSubtitle: We provide structured, trusted educational pathways so students in Turkey can access international opportunities without disrupting their current schooling.
about.mission1: Catalyst Education & Research Inc. is a Canada-based education organization operating as the authorized administrative representative for the Ontario Secondary School Diploma (OSSD) distance pathway in Turkey.
about.mission2: We manage the complete student journey — from initial enrollment and course planning through to graduation — in a structured and systematic way.
about.mission3: Our goal is to enable students to earn a globally recognized high school diploma without relocating to Canada, while providing families with trustworthy guidance throughout the process.
about.mission4: By combining TVO ILC's official academic framework with our local advisory and ongoing support model, we transform what seems like a complex process into a clear, manageable educational plan.
about.diff1Desc: Process management aligned with the academic system defined by the Ontario Ministry of Education
about.diff2Desc: A customized course and graduation plan based on each student's prior educational background
about.diff3Title: Continuous local support and family communication
about.diff3Desc: Accessible advisory services in Turkey and regular progress monitoring
about.stat1Desc: Through our partnership with TVO ILC, we provide students with a structured and trusted diploma pathway.
about.stat2Desc: Students who have successfully completed the program have earned the right to apply to universities worldwide.
about.stat3Desc: We provide continuous advisory and academic monitoring from enrollment through to graduation.
about.testimonialsSubtitle: Examples from the real experiences of students who have completed the program
about.t1Text: Completed the Ontario Secondary School Diploma program while continuing at her school in Turkey. After graduation, she was accepted to a university in Canada and is now studying in an international environment.
about.t2Text: Started the Canadian diploma process during high school. He received consistent academic support throughout the program and gained a significant advantage in his international university applications after graduating.
about.t3Text: Completed the program without disrupting her current school routine. Thanks to academic planning and continuous advisory support, she confidently navigated the application process for her target university.
